abstract: A distance over which the framework fades out the mixer’s sound.
overview:
## Discussion

As a sound source’s distance between the listener approaches the value of this property, the framework gradually lowers the sound’s volume to `0`. Beyond this distance, PHASE culls the sound. This property offers an additional fade out that the framework applies on top of the spatial mixer’s [doc://com.apple.phase/documentation/PHASE/PHASESpatialMixerDefinition/distanceModelParameters].

The framework calculates distance as the difference between the listener’s position and the sound-source position, scaled by the engine’s [doc://com.apple.phase/documentation/PHASE/PHASEEngine/unitsPerMeter].

# fadeOutParameters

**Instance Property**

A distance over which the framework fades out the mixer’s sound.

## Declaration

```swift
var fadeOutParameters: PHASEDistanceModelFadeOutParameters? { get set }
```

## Discussion

As a sound source’s distance between the listener approaches the value of this property, the framework gradually lowers the sound’s volume to `0`. Beyond this distance, PHASE culls the sound. This property offers an additional fade out that the framework applies on top of the spatial mixer’s [doc://com.apple.phase/documentation/PHASE/PHASESpatialMixerDefinition/distanceModelParameters].

The framework calculates distance as the difference between the listener’s position and the sound-source position, scaled by the engine’s [doc://com.apple.phase/documentation/PHASE/PHASEEngine/unitsPerMeter].
title: fadeOutParameters
